headline: Dover Set to Report Q1 Earnings: What's in Store for the Stock?

headline: Worthington Steel Earns John Deere’s Highest Supplier Rating for 14th Consecutive Year; Receives Inaugural Community Engagement Award
summary: COLUMBUS, Ohio, April 20, 2026--Worthington Steel, Inc. (NYSE: WS) recognized as a Partner-level supplier by John Deere and presented with their inaugural Community Engagement Award.
